title: Four ways to ride the AI escalator

tl.label: Standing
tl.description: Coasting. You arrive with the crowd.

tr.label: Climbing
tr.description: Working the steps. The only way ahead.

bl.label: Refusing
bl.description: Arms crossed. Stuck on the ground floor.

br.label: The stairs
br.description: Pure effort, no machine. Still losing ground.
